lines.name: Foulborn Reefbane

explicitModifiers.text: Glows while in an Area containing a Unique Fish

mutatedModifiers.text: 35% chance to Ignore Stuns while Casting

lines.flavourText:
He cast far into the ocean
And tore out her heart.

lines.name: The Golden Charlatan

explicitModifiers.text: Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage
Gain a random Shrine Buff for 30 seconds when you Kill a Rare or Unique Enemy

lines.flavourText:
"He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"

lines.name: Replica Wings of Entropy

explicitModifiers.text: +(9-12)% Chance to Block Attack Damage while Dual Wielding
+(13.49-19.45)% to Off Hand Critical Strike Chance

lines.flavourText:
"The remarkable imbalance of Prototype #848 leads to uncommon
power or speed when striking."

lines.name: The Winds of Fate

implicitModifiers.text: +22% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: 75% of Physical Damage converted to a random Element
25% of Physical Damage Converted to Chaos Damage

lines.flavourText:
Life... Death...
The whim of the cosmos.

lines.name: Foulborn Void Battery

explicitModifiers.text: 25% increased Spell Damage per Power Charge

mutatedModifiers.text: 3% increased Area of Effect per Power Charge

lines.flavourText:
"The trick is to give nothingness,
and to receive everything in return."
- Inquisitor Maligaro

lines.name: Foulborn Reefbane

explicitModifiers.text: Glows while in an Area containing a Unique Fish

mutatedModifiers.text: (30-40)% chance to Ignore Stuns while Casting

lines.flavourText:
He cast far into the ocean
And tore out her heart.

lines.name: Foulborn Null's Inclination

explicitModifiers.text:
Trigger Socketed Minion Spells on Kill with this Weapon
Minion Spells Triggered by this Item have a 0.25 second Cooldown with 5 Uses
Minions deal 2% increased Damage per 5 Dexterity

mutatedModifiers.text: An Enemy Writhing Worm spawns every 2 seconds
Minions deal (26-33) to (51-65) additional Chaos Damage

lines.flavourText: The hunt continues when the prey falls.

lines.name: Foulborn Uul-Netol's Embrace

explicitModifiers.text: Trigger Level 20 Bone Nova when you Hit a Bleeding Enemy

mutatedModifiers.text: Bleeding you inflict deals Damage (20-40)% faster

lines.flavourText:
At last she holds us,
and so we turn to dust.

lines.name: Voidforge

implicitModifiers.text: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 700% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element
20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

lines.flavourText:
A weapon born of nothingness,
can only create more nothingness.

lines.name: Voidforge

implicitModifiers.text: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 700% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element
20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

lines.flavourText:
A weapon born of nothingness,
can only create more nothingness.

lines.name: Replica Duskdawn

implicitModifiers.text: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: +10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
+1% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+60% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've dealt a Non-Critical Strike Recently
(122-150)% increased Elemental Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently

lines.flavourText:
"Lab Two suffered significant structural damage in the process of creating
Prototype #77. It is, however, the closest we've come to perfection."

lines.name: Voidforge

implicitModifiers.text: 30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills

explicitModifiers.text: Gain 700% of Weapon Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element
20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

lines.flavourText:
A weapon born of nothingness,
can only create more nothingness.

lines.name: Oni-Goroshi

explicitModifiers.text: Adds 2 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks per Level
Gain Her Embrace for 3 seconds when you Ignite an Enemy
While in Her Embrace, take 0.5% of your total Maximum Life and Energy Shield as Fire Damage per second per Level

lines.flavourText:
"Your name is Demon Slayer? Really? Good name for rotgut, that."
She said: I prefer "The Goddess Of Swords". Much more dignified. And accurate.
"Demon Slayer The Cheap And Nasty it is then. Burns going down, burns coming up?"
She said: Every single time, Charan. And still...you'll bathe me, and you'll drink my love. Until you can't.

lines.name: Jiquani's Potential

implicitModifiers.text: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: +(-1-1) to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
1 to (31-53) Spell Lightning Damage per 10 Intelligence

lines.flavourText:
"I have risked everything. My position, my ambition, my
very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

lines.name: Foulborn Hand of Thought and Motion

explicitModifiers.text: Adds 1 to 12 Lightning Damage to Attacks with this Weapon per 10 Dexterity

lines.flavourText:
She carries us and nurtures us
until we must feed upon each other.

lines.name: Tawhoa's Felling

explicitModifiers.text:
Trigger Level 20 Tawhoa's Chosen when you Attack with
a Non-Vaal Slam or Strike Skill near an Enemy
(20-30)% reduced Enemy Stun Threshold with this Weapon

lines.flavourText:
Strike with the might of a falling oak,
and know that you never stand alone.

lines.name: The Grey Wind

explicitModifiers.text: Attacks with this Weapon have Added Fire Damage equal to (8-12)% of Player's Maximum Life
Each Rage also grants +2% to Fire Damage Over Time Multiplier
Nearby Enemies have Fire Exposure while at maximum Rage

lines.flavourText:
Silence fell... we gazed upon high.
The Red Pyre flared, palms wide.
Ash-laden gales scoured our flesh.
Four screams became one roar.

lines.name: Jiquani's Potential

implicitModifiers.text: +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: +(-1-1) to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
1 to (31-53) Spell Lightning Damage per 10 Intelligence

lines.flavourText:
"I have risked everything. My position, my ambition, my
very life. There has to be a way to save our people. If we
must, let us tear apart the very foundations of reality!"

lines.name: Foulborn The Poet's Pen

explicitModifiers.text: +1 to Level of Socketed Skill Gems per 25 Player Levels
Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack with this Weapon, with a 0.25 second Cooldown

mutatedModifiers.text: Adds 3 to 5 Physical Damage to Spells per 3 Player Levels

lines.flavourText: In every piece of prose, lies a tiny spark of magic.

lines.name: Foulborn Darkscorn

explicitModifiers.text: 25% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
20% chance for Poisons inflicted with this Weapon to deal 300% more Damage

mutatedModifiers.text: 25% chance to gain Unholy Might for 4 seconds on Critical Strike

lines.flavourText:
"The Spirit of War knows nothing of good and evil.
It knows only destruction."
- Sekhema Asenath

lines.name: Foulborn The Flame of Hope

explicitModifiers.text:
Inflict Fire Exposure on Hit against Enemies with
5 Cinderflame, applying -25% to Fire Resistance

lines.flavourText:
"So long as a single flame flickers, our akhara lives.
And when there is nothing left to give to the fire,
we shall burn the enemy for warmth!"
- Varashta, the Winter Sekhema

lines.name: Kingmaker

explicitModifiers.text: Nearby Allies have 30% increased Item Rarity
Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent your Melee Attacks
Nearby Allies have +50% to Critical Strike Multiplier

lines.flavourText:
A King and his people are linked together
like a soul and a beating heart.
Both can be severed by a same edge, 
then forged anew.

lines.name: Starforge

explicitModifiers.text: 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

lines.flavourText: The end is written into the beginning.

lines.name: The Fulcrum

implicitModifiers.text: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: (1-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
(1-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Cold Damage
(1-50)% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Elemental Ailments you inflict are Reflected to you
Elemental Damage with Hits is Lucky while you are Shocked
Damage Penetrates (8-10)% Elemental Resistances while you are Chilled
Gain (30-40)% of Physical Damage as Extra Damage of a random Element while you are Ignited

lines.flavourText:
To stand at the confluence of the elements,
the master must achieve perfect balance.

lines.name: Starforge

explicitModifiers.text: 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks

lines.flavourText: The end is written into the beginning.
